title: corylus avellana var. urticifolia
intro: Corylus avellana var. urticifolia, also known as the stinging hazel or nettle-leaved hazel, is a variety of the hazel tree that is characterized by its leaves, which resemble those of the stinging nettle. The medicinal properties of Corylus avellana var. urticifolia include its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Corylus avellana var. urticifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
